2.Name: Tina's Mindrealm
2.ActDes: Revisit the main dungeon "Tina's Mindrealm" to experience the full story and uncover special in-dungeon events.
2.UnlockDes: Unlocked after completing the quest [Night Suspended on the Precipice]

3.Name: Towering Ruin
3.ActDes: Revisit the main dungeon "Towering Ruin" to experience the full storyline and uncover special in-dungeon events.
3.UnlockDes: Unlocked after completing the quest [Night Suspended on the Precipice]

5.Name: Cursed Radiant Tomb
5.ActDes: Head to the "Unit X" Research Facility to uncover the secrets of giant machines! Whether solo or in a team, it's your main source of gear. Rewards don't stack.
5.UnlockDes: Unlocked after completing the quest [Night Suspended on the Precipice]

6.Name: Mechanized Processing Facility
6.ActDes: Head to the "Unit X" Research Facility to uncover the secrets of giant machines! Whether solo or in a team, it's your main source of gear. Rewards don't stack.

7.Name: Void - Tina's Mindrealm
7.ActDes: Head to the "Unit X" Research Facility to uncover the secrets of giant machines! Whether solo or in a team, it's your main source of gear. Rewards don't stack.

8.Name: Mistveil Hunting Ground
8.ActDes: Head to the "Unit X" Research Facility to uncover the secrets of giant machines! Whether solo or in a team, it's your main source of gear. Rewards don't stack.

9.Name: Daily Mission
9.ActDes: Complete dungeons, explorations, and other activities to obtain EXP and Honor Coins. Rewards don't stack.

10.Name: Bureau Commissions
10.ActDes: Pioneer Bureau posts 3 quests daily, an important source of Honor Coins! Supports solo or team completion. Commissions can accumulate for up to 3 days.

11.Name: Elite Hunt
11.ActDes:
Hunt elite monsters in the wild! Use daily loot keys to open chests and obtain rich rewards. Keys can stack for up to 3 days.
Only the player or team that lands the first hit gets chest access!

12.Name: Boss Hunt
12.ActDes:
Hunt elite monsters in the wild! Use daily loot keys to open chests and obtain rich rewards-keys can stack for up to 3 days.
Defeating a boss grants extra rewards with a chance to obtain gear.

14.Name: Cursed Radiant Tomb
14.ActDes:
Chaotic Realm pushes adventurers to their limits. Each clear offers chances at great rewards. Additionally, there's a chance to get exclusive appearance items of the current dungeon!
Drop: Gauntlets, Earrings

15.Name: Mechanized Processing Facility
15.ActDes:
Chaotic Realm pushes adventurers to their limits. Each clear offers chances at great rewards. Additionally, there's a chance to get exclusive appearance items of the current dungeon!
Drop: Helmet, Necklace

16.Name: Void - Tina's Mindrealm
16.ActDes:
Chaotic Realm pushes adventurers to their limits. Each clear offers chances at great rewards. Additionally, there's a chance to get exclusive appearance items of the current dungeon!
Drop: Armor, Ring

17.Name: Mistveil Hunting Ground
17.ActDes:
Chaotic Realm offers more powerful boss mechanics and monster abilities, challenging adventurers to their true limits! Each clear offers chances at great rewards. Additionally, there's a chance to get exclusive appearance items of the current dungeon!
Drop: Bracelet (L), Bracelet (R)

18.Name: World Boss Crusade
18.ActDes: You can battle alongside up to 20 players to showcase your superior skills! Work together to defeat the World Boss and win generous rewards!

19.Name: Fishing
19.ActDes: Cast your line to challenge unknown fish species, let's see what you can catch.

20.Name: Guild Cargo
20.ActDes: Join a Guild and take on cargo quests at the Guild Center to obtain Luno and Guild Tokens! Tokens can be exchanged for refining materials, dyes, cosmetics, and more. Rewards don't stack, so be sure to join in daily!

21.Name: Trial Path
21.ActDes: Take the Class Trials to master your class! Complete the trial and unlock exclusive items to boost your class talents and elevate your class Level!

23.Name: Culinary
23.ActDes: Combine ingredients by recipe to cook dishes that restore HP and grant buffs-an essential prep tip for every adventurer!

26.Name: Exploration
26.ActDes: Every place where Engram flows is full of vitality. Explore unknown areas to gain not only precious treasures but also unique experiences.
26.UnlockDes: Unlocks after completing the quest [New Discovery - Part Three]

27.Name: Fireworks Festival
27.ActDes: Fireworks will light up the sky at Asterleeds. Adventurers are specially invited to dress up and share in this romantic experience!
27.OtherDes:
Opens with the Seabreeze Festival event
Recommend: Solo/Team Challenge

28.Name: Stimen Vaults
28.ActDes: "Forge the Inverted Spire-an arrow driven into the earth." Descend into the mysterious Bapharian Ruins and uncover hidden secrets. Team up, explore the depths, and claim great rewards! Stimen Vaults reset every two weeks.
28.OtherDes:
All day
Weekly Reset:​​ Mon. 02:00 - 05:00(UTC-2)
Recommend: Team Challenge

29.Name: Guild Hunt
29.ActDes: Team up with your Guild to hunt in the wilds, complete shared goals, and obtain challenge rewards!

30.Name: Guild Dance
30.ActDes: Show off your dance moves on the Guild stage to obtain rewards and boost your hunting comrades!

31.Name: Guild Activity
31.ActDes: Join a Guild and work with members to complete weekly goals and obtain rewards like Guild Tokens!

32.Name: Magical Creatures
32.ActDes:
Cute Boarlets and rare Nappos appear randomly on the plains! Defeat them for a chance at rare items.
Scheduled: Lovely Boarlet, Breezy Boarlet.
Random: Loyal Boarlet, Golden Nappo, Silver Nappo.

33.Name: Check-in
33.ActDes: Go to the Guild for daily check-in activities

34.Name: Life Skill
34.ActDes: Learn a Life Skill that interests you, use your daily Focus wisely to level it up, and harvest various sellable materials.

35.Name: Botany
35.ActDes: Gather various flowers, herbs, mushrooms, and fruits in the wild. The materials obtained are primarily supplied to the Alchemy and Culinary classes.

36.Name: Mineralogy
36.ActDes: Mine various metal ores in the wild. The materials obtained are primarily supplied to the Smelting class for processing.

37.Name: Gemology
37.ActDes: Gather various crystal ores in the wild. The materials obtained are primarily supplied to the Gemcrafting class for processing.

38.Name: Alchemy
38.ActDes: A mysterious craft that can make instant recovery potions, elemental damage boosting potions, and resistance potions, providing ample preparation for exploration and combat. Additionally, it can be used to create dyes and some toys.

39.Name: Smelting
39.ActDes: A craft focused on processing metal ores, primarily creating materials needed for refining different gear parts. It can also produce metal products required by other crafts.

40.Name: Gemcrafting
40.ActDes: A craft focused on processing various Gems, primarily creating energy-imbued gems for socketing. It can also produce raw materials needed for crafting dyes.

41.Name: Artisanry
41.ActDes: A profession specializing in processing various types of wood. Can craft wooden materials, wooden furniture, and flux agents.

42.Name: Weaving
42.ActDes: This profession produces various threads, fabrics, and leather goods, and also makes dyes and furniture.

45.Name: Slumberdream Valley
45.AwardDes: Exclusive Appearance / Modules / Gear / Will Wish Coin
45.ActDes:
To combat the highlands' Illusory Plague, researchers extracted energy from Illusory Blooms and created an illusion testing ground—Slumberdream Valley. However, illusion power is impossible to fully control, and everything within has become unpredictable.

Artisans forged defensive devices at the entrance, while adventurers ventured deep within to uncover its secrets. Some lost themselves, sinking into the dreamscape forever. This place is both a land of irresistible temptation and a beacon of hope for restoring peace to the highlands.
45.OtherDes: All day. Recommend: Solo / Team Challenge

50.Name: Floating Island - Dragon Shackles
50.ActDes: The Bapharian Legacy has resurfaced on the Floating Island, quietly stirring a surge of energy that opens a gateway to the unknown. Three forces intertwine, and from afar, the echo of an ancient dragon's awakening can be heard.

51.Name: Dreambloom Ruins
51.ActDes: The Illusory Blooms have spread into the Bapharian Ruins. Creatures once roaming the ruins, as well as the Golem guarding them, have undergone mutations under the influence of the Illusory Plague. To prevent the disaster from spreading, the priests of the Pillar of Divinity have entrusted the protagonist with purging the Illusory Blooms.

101.Name: Void - Towering Ruin
101.ActDes: Head to the "Unit X" Research Facility to uncover the secrets of giant machines! Whether solo or in a team, it's your main source of gear. Rewards don't stack.

102.Name: Void - Towering Ruin
102.ActDes:
Chaotic Realm offers more powerful boss mechanics and monster abilities, challenging adventurers to their true limits! Each clear offers chances at great rewards. Additionally, there's a chance to get exclusive appearance items of the current dungeon!
Drop: Boots, Charm

103.Name: Dragon Claw Valley
103.ActDes: Re-explore the main story dungeon "Dragon Claw Valley", experience the complete dungeon story, and discover special events within the dungeon.

104.Name: Sea-Ringed Reef
104.ActDes: Head to the "Unit X" Research Facility to uncover the secrets of giant machines! Whether solo or in a team, it's your main source of gear. Rewards don't stack.

105.Name: Dark Mist Fortress
105.ActDes:
Chaotic Realm pushes adventurers to their limits. Each clear offers chances at great rewards.
Drop: Weapon (high) and other parts (low)

106.Name: Devourer Cage
106.ActDes: Head to the "Unit X" Research Facility to uncover the secrets of giant machines! Whether solo or in a team, it's your main source of gear. Rewards don't stack.

107.Name: Sea-Ringed Reef
107.ActDes:
Chaotic Realm pushes adventurers to their limits. Each clear offers chances at great rewards. Additionally, there's a chance to get exclusive appearance items of the current dungeon!
Drop: Weapon

201.Name: City Rally
201.ActDes:
Ride your beloved mount and complete the Asterleeds circuit race! Feel the seabreeze, witness the waves, and hear the roar of the engines. Young rider, go create a new legend!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

202.Name: Wasteland Race
202.ActDes:
Parkour enthusiasts race through the ruins, leaping over rubble and corridors, dodging lightning and whirlwinds, leaving their opponents far behind. Only the victors can claim the trophy!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

203.Name: Balloon Capture
203.ActDes:
Balloons are suspended in midair. Players must work together to create clouds to reach them and earn rewards!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

204.Name: Ancient City Patrol
204.ActDes:
Join Asterleeds Troopers on scheduled raids to clear goblins in the Ancient City of Vill. Follow the troopers, and you'll earn rewards at regular intervals!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

205.Name: Brigand Camp Patrol
205.ActDes:
Join Asterleeds Troopers on scheduled raids to clear Brigands at the Brigand camp. Follow the troopers, and you'll earn rewards at regular intervals!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.
205.OtherDes: Departs daily at 12:45, 17:45, and 22:45(UTC-2), starting from the Day3 after server launch

206.Name: Muku Camp Patrol
206.ActDes:
Join Kanamia warriors on scheduled raids to clear Mukus at the Muku camp. Follow the warriors, and you'll earn rewards at regular intervals!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.
206.OtherDes: Departs Daily at 13:45, 18:45, and 23:45(UTC-2), starting from the Day5 after server launch

207.Name: Dance Novice
207.ActDes:
Dancer Zoraida leads a dance session on the bridge. Come join the fun! Stay within the designated area, and you'll earn rewards at regular intervals!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

208.Name: Street Theater
208.ActDes:
Asterleeds is hosting a live street performance where participants act out specific characters. Come vote for your favorites! Stay within the designated area, and you'll earn rewards at regular intervals!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

209.Name: Parade! Charming Fish
209.ActDes:
The Fishing Guild is hosting a charming fish parade. Hurry, bring your fish and join the fun!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

210.Name: Parade! Boarlet Knight
210.ActDes:
A Lovely Boarlet has appeared in town! She's the mascot of the Boarlet Riders. Mount a Boarlet to join her riding parade!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

211.Name: Ee-chan, don't stare at me!
211.ActDes:
When Ee-chan turns back, it's your chance to run! But be careful, Ee-chan might look back at any moment... If you're caught, you'll have to start over. Reach the finish line without being spotted to win the game!
Your first participation of the day grants Friendship Points and Gears. Repeat attempts grant few friendship points. A weekly cap applies.

302.Name: Starlight Fireworks
302.ActDes:
A gentle seabreeze, fireworks blooming just for you. During the event, head to the beach and search for treasures prepared by the stars and fireworks.
Event Time:
10/09-10/12, 10/17-10/18, 10/24-10/25, 10/31-11/01, 11/07-11/08
Opens at 20:20, 20:44, 21:08, 21:32, and 21:56 every night, each window lasting 10 minutes.
302.PreDec: A gentle seabreeze, fireworks blooming just for you. Each night, head to the beach and search for treasures prepared by the stars and fireworks.

303.Name: Spindrift Supply
303.ActDes:
Welcome to the Spindrift Supply! Deliver daily life materials to earn Silver Star Badges and help light up the Seabreeze Festival skies.
During the event, complete material collection quests from Gaido at the Asterleeds Artisan Guild to earn extra Silver Star Badges. Redeem them at the Seabreeze Store for tons of rewards!
Material collection quests require unlocking the corresponding life skill first. After completing the guide quest, you can accept the quest.
303.PreDec:
Welcome to the Spindrift Supply! Deliver daily life materials to earn Silver Star Badges and help light up the Seabreeze Festival skies.
During the event, complete material collection quests from Gaido at the Asterleeds Artisan Guild to earn extra Silver Star Badges. Redeem them at the Seabreeze Store for tons of rewards!

304.Name: Silverstar Carnival
304.ActDes:
Starlight falls, and the festivities begin. Join a variety of active events to gather Silver Star Badges and celebrate with your friends!
Earn bonus Silver Star Badges from: Bureau Commissions, Unstable Space, Guild's Cargo Operations, first-time casual modes, and Activity Chests. Redeem them in the Seabreeze Store for plentiful rewards!
304.PreDec: Starlight falls, and the festivities begin. Join a variety of active events to gather Silver Star Badges and celebrate with your friends!

305.Name: Seabreeze Gifts
305.PreDec: Each morning brings a gift. The seabreeze never forgets those who celebrate with heart.

306.Name: Windsoothe Parade
306.PreDec: Step onto the parade path, and let the seabreeze guide you through every festive scene. They say each stop along the way is a wish offered to the ocean.

307.Name: Dragon Shackles - Adept's Trial
307.ActDes:
Before the dragon's shadow descends, the stars shall sound the horn of valor. Enter the arena and take on the Adept's Trial of Dragon Shackles!
During the event, adventurers of Level 30+ can participate in the Adept's Trial. Defeating monsters within will grant Silver Star Badges and Adept Medals. Adept Medals can be exchanged in the Seabreeze Store for Lv.40 Legendary Gear - Select Chests and Runic Alloy Shards!
307.PreDec: Before the dragon's shadow descends, the stars shall sound the horn of valor. Enter the arena and take on the Adept's Trial of Dragon Shackles!

308.Name: Master's Trial: Scorching Warfare
308.ActDes:
Explore the depths of the Chaotic Realm warped by primal Void Corruption Power and rise as a ​Void Vanguard!
During the event, the [Master's Trial!] quest will auto-activate. Reach 2,000 points in Master Mode to complete the event and earn a permanent exclusive reward!
Master 5 is affected by the "​Void Vanguard." During the event, all enemies gain significant stat boosts.
308.PreDec:
Explore the depths of the Chaotic Realm warped by primal Void Corruption Power and rise as a Void Vanguard!
During the event, the [Master's Trial!] quest will auto-activate. Reach 2,000 points in Master Mode to complete the event and earn a permanent exclusive reward!

310.Name: Memento of the Journey
310.PreDec: As summer fades and autumn arrives, time moves on. Yet, the traces of a life well-lived are never forgotten.

311.Name: Gift of Time
311.PreDec:
The celebration is here, and the gifts are abundant.
The Kanamia Harvest Festival has begun. Accept this gift from the tribe.

312.Name: Ancestral Ash Pact​
312.ActDes:
The Flame of the Renewal burns strong! Infuse your prayers into the Ash Pact and cast it into the Flame of the Renewal. As your wishes rise with the fire, the ancestral spirits will answer your call.

During the event, collect 4 types of Ash Pacts and offer them at the Kanamia Bonfire for great rewards!
312.PreDec: The Flame of the Renewal burns strong! Infuse your prayers into the Ash Pact and cast it into the Flame of the Renewal. As your wishes rise with the fire, the ancestral spirits will answer your call.

313.Name: Trail of Legacy
313.ActDes:
Follow the fire, retrace the Path of the Ancestors.

Collect all tribal postcards and gather the memories of Kanamia's history.
313.PreDec: Awaken the Flame of the Renewal and listen to the echoes of the tribe's past.

314.Name: Spirit Dance​
314.ActDes:
No skill required! Just follow your heart! Dance freely, and feel the raw passion of the Kanamia Spirit Dance!
Dec. 5-Dec. 29
Fri. Sat. Sun. 10:44, 11:08, 13:56, 14:20, 17:08, 17:32, 20:20, 20:44, 23:32, 23:56 (UTC-2). 10 min each.
314.PreDec: No skill required! Just follow your heart! Dance freely, and feel the raw passion of the Kanamia Spirit Dance!

315.Name: Harvest Feast​
315.ActDes:
During the Harvest Festival, banquets are held daily from 00:00-05:00, 12:00-17:00, and 18:00-23:00. Come taste tribal delicacies and gain unique buffs.
Abundant Food: Consuming it increases Strength, Agility, and Intellect by 300 for 1 hour. Duration stacks with each consumption, up to a maximum of 5 hours.
Magic Food: Consuming it grants a random special effect for 3 minutes.
315.PreDec: The Harvest Feast Begins! Come taste tribal delicacies and gain unique buffs.

316.Name: Loom of Dreams​
316.ActDes:
The Ancestral Spores have spread, and the Web of Dreams is complete. Assist the Autumn Priest in venturing into the Dream Web to dispel the nightmares and cleanse the dreams of our people!

Adventurers above Lv.30 can join this event, defeat dream monsters to collect Ancestral Spores, and exchange them in Harvest Store for rich rewards.
316.PreDec: The Ancestral Spores have spread, and the Web of Dreams is complete. Assist the Autumn Priest in venturing into the Dream Web to dispel the nightmares and cleanse the dreams of our people!

317.Name: Priest's Tally​
317.ActDes:
Assist in completing the tribe's grain-storing ritual and share in the celebration. (Food refreshes every 5 min.)
Starting Dec. 6: The Tier 2 Daily Activity Chest grants Priest's Boon.
Starting Dec. 8: Participating in Unstable Space, Chaotic Realm, Dragon Shackles, or opening Boss Chests gives you a chance to obtain Priest's Boon. (Weekly cap: 15).
Starting Dec 8: Clearing Chaotic Realm (Master 6 or higher) guarantees 1 Dim Lattice (cap: 30). After Dec. 15, Dim Lattices can be exchanged for rewards at the Harvest Market.
317.PreDec: Celebrate the Harvest Festival and fill the granaries! Assist the Autumn Priest in completing the tribe's grain-storing ritual and share in the celebration.

319.Name: Prelude of Crimson
319.ActDes: Airona, who had promised to travel with you to the Bahamar Highlands, vanished on the day of departure. At the Double-Faced Coin where you first met, a special drink brings clarity and a few rumors hide clues. Following those leads and reuniting with Airona, you find yourself in a surreal, dream-like space filled with unknown power...
319.PreDec: Airona, who had promised to travel with you to the Bahamar Highlands, vanished on the day of departure. At the Double-Faced Coin where you first met, a special drink brings clarity, and a few rumors hide clues. Following those leads and reuniting with Airona, you find yourself in a surreal, dream-like space filled with unknown power...

321.Name: Nocturne Wardrobe
321.ActDes: New themed outfits are now available! Come and pick your favorite look. Tonight's stage of mischief is yours to shine on!
321.PreDec: New themed outfits are now available! Come and pick your favorite look. Tonight's stage of mischief is yours to shine on!

322.Name: Trickster's Candy Jar
322.ActDes:
Stop by the Pumpkin Candy Jar every day to secretly nab a dose of sweetness. The more candies you collect, the grander the surprises you'll unlock!
Up to 1,000 Mischief Candies can be obtained during the event.
322.PreDec: Stop by the Pumpkin Candy Jar every day to secretly nab a dose of sweetness. The more candies you collect, the grander the surprises you'll unlock!

323.Name: Glimmering Moments
323.ActDes: Your fingertips graze the light of dawn and dusk, your gaze captures the shadows of the everyday. These scattered, dazzling colors piece together a scrapbook of moments that are yours alone.
323.PreDec: Your fingertips graze the light of dawn and dusk, your gaze captures the shadows of the everyday. These scattered, dazzling colors piece together a scrapbook of moments that are yours alone.

324.Name: Master's Trial: Dream Resonance
324.ActDes:
Master's Trial: Dream Resonance!
Shatter the dream and face the final trial of the Illusion!
During the event, the [Master's Trial!] quest will auto-activate. Reach 1800/1900/2000 points in Master Mode to complete the event and earn a permanent exclusive reward!
The Master 5 is affected by the Source of Illusion. During the event, all enemies gain massive stat boosts. This affix will disappear once the event ends.
324.PreDec:
Master's Trial: Dream Resonance!
Shatter the dream and face the final trial of the Illusion!

325.Name: Winterfest Gift
325.ActDes:
Winterfest Gifts, Available Daily! Remember to find the festival envoy and check in daily to collect exclusive rewards, which can be exchanged for prizes in the Winterfest Store!
Snow's Gifts earned in the event can also be exchanged for rewards at the gift pile beside Snoy in Asterleeds Town Gate Square.

326.Name: Snowman Strike! Nappo Hunt
326.ActDes:
Snowman Soldiers, Assemble and Strike! Mischievous Snow Nappos will appear in the plains. Transform into a snowman, join the joyful chase, and defeat them to win exclusive rewards!
Defeat Snow Nappo to earn up to 20 Snow's Gifts each week, and up to 100 Nappo's Snowballs throughout the entire event.
326.PreDec: Snowman Soldiers, Assemble and Strike! Mischievous Snow Nappos will appear in the plains. Transform into a snowman, join the joyful chase, and defeat them to win exclusive rewards!

327.Name: Morph Party
327.ActDes:
Morph Party: Let the Celebration Begin! Immerse yourself in the traditions of winter legends and discover the magic of random morphs in this wonderland of lights and imagination!
This event unlocks once the adventurer reaches Level 10.
Your first participation each day grants extra Snow's Gift.

328.Name: Whimsical Winterfest
328.ActDes:
During Winterfest, Surprise Gifts will pop up all around Asterleeds. They might be tucked under the eaves, or hidden right around the corner. Keep your eyes open and try to find them all! As the celebration goes on, more fun little games will be rolling out. Let's collect some winter joy together!
There are 5 Surprise Gifts per round. Location Hints:
12/18: Pioneer Bureau;
12/21: The Spinning Rudder;
12/22: Artisan Guild;
12/25: Fashion Store;
12/28: Seaside Restaurant;
12/29: Inn;
1/1: Ocean Hill;
1/4: Alchemy Workshop

330.Name: Fortune's Perfect Bloom
330.ActDes: The Starland Club is now open! A large number of Mahjong tables are available on the second floor. Just pull up a seat and play! Grab your friends and give it a try, Adventurer!

331.Name: Windborne Whispers
331.ActDes: During springtime in Asterleeds, the wings of the Wind Messengers are adorned with letters full of sweet nothings on Flower Vow Day. Every heartfelt message sent transforms into a gentle breeze, carrying the lovers' words to their destination.
331.PreDec: During springtime in Asterleeds, the wings of the Wind Messengers are adorned with letters full of sweet nothings on Flower Vow Day. Every heartfelt message sent transforms into a gentle breeze, carrying the lovers' words to their destination.

332.Name: Renewal Light
332.ActDes:
"Renewal Light" Limited-Time Wish Now Live!
Open it for a chance to obtain Spring Dawn outfit series and Renewal Light Vault Cards. Take the Renewal Light Vault Cards to the Renewal Store to exchange for a variety of appearance rewards. There are also Dancing Dragon and Lion mounts waiting for you!
332.PreDec:
"Renewal Light" Limited-Time Wish Now Live!
Open it for a chance to obtain Spring Dawn outfit series and Renewal Light Vault Cards. Take the Renewal Light Vault Cards to the Renewal Store to exchange for a variety of appearance rewards. There are also Dancing Dragon and Lion mounts waiting for you!

333.Name: Gifts of Renewal
333.ActDes:
The Renewal Festival has arrived! The Renewal Light shines through the winter fog, lighting up the new year in Asterleeds.
During the Renewal Festival, Adventurers can visit the [Time Guide, Linne], to complete daily check-ins and receive "a gift from the First Renewal Light". Additionally, completing the weekly "Gifts of Renewal" and "Festival Red Envelope Giveaway" quests will also grant rich rewards and festive gifts!
333.PreDec:
The Renewal Festival has arrived! The Renewal Light shines through the winter fog, lighting up the new year in Asterleeds.
During the Renewal Festival, Adventurers can visit the [Time Guide, Linne], to complete daily check-ins and receive "a gift from the First Renewal Light". Additionally, completing the weekly "Gifts of Renewal" and "Festival Red Envelope Giveaway" quests will also grant rich rewards and festive gifts!

334.Name: Year Demon Strikes
334.ActDes:
Recommend: 1-20 players.
Alert! The Year Demon strikes! Anomaly detected in front of the Plains Outpost! Adventurers, assemble! Head to Andra Outpost and use the special item "Firecracker" to suppress the Year Demon and protect the peace of the Renewal Festival!
Successfully defeating the Year Demon grants up to 40 Renewal Seals per week.
334.PreDec: Alert! The Year Demon strikes! Anomaly detected in front of the Plains Outpost! Adventurers, assemble! Head to Andra Outpost and use the special item "Firecracker" to suppress the Year Demon and protect the peace of the Renewal Festival!

335.Name: Colorflare Trial
335.ActDes:
Don't just keep your New Year's wishes in your heart—let them soar with brilliant fireworks! During the event, firework launchers will be set up throughout the festival area. Use gunpowder of different colors to light up the sky with your own special spark.
There are 9 firework formulas for Adventurers to discover! Let's set off some fireworks together!
Each time you accumulate a full bar of points, you have a chance to get a Renewal Seal. You can obtain a cumulative total of up to 100 Renewal Seals from this event and the Spring Lantern Fair.
Your first participation each day during the event will grant an extra 3 Renewal Seals. (This reward is not included in the cumulative limit.)
335.PreDec:
Don't just keep your New Year's wishes in your heart—let them soar with brilliant fireworks! During the event, firework launchers will be set up throughout the festival area. Use gunpowder of different colors to light up the sky with your own special spark.
There are 9 firework formulas for adventurers to discover! Let's set off some fireworks together!
Each time you accumulate a full bar of points, you will get 1 Renewal Seal. You can obtain a cumulative total of up to 100 Renewal Seals from this event and the Spring Lantern Fair.
Your first participation each day during the event will grant an extra 3 Renewal Seals. (This reward is not included in the cumulative limit.)

336.Name: Renewal Unfolds
336.ActDes: As the Renewal Light flows, each day of the festival will unlock new surprises. During the Renewal Festival, there will be a new Riddle of the Renewal Light daily. Additionally, the Festival Interlude series of festive mini-games and event quests will also be released regularly.
336.PreDec: As the Renewal Light flows, each day of the festival will unlock new surprises. During the Renewal Festival, there will be a new Riddle of the Renewal Light daily. Additionally, the Festival Interlude series of festive mini-games and event quests will also be released regularly.

337.Name: Spring Lantern Fair
337.ActDes:
Awaken the spring breeze with lively celebrations and mark the Renewal Light with lanterns. Collect and release lanterns of four colors to light up the sky over Asterleeds together.
Each time you accumulate a full bar of points, you will receive 1 Renewal Seal. You can obtain a cumulative total of up to 100 Renewal Seals from this event and the Colorflare Trial.
Your first participation each day during the event will grant an extra 3 Renewal Seals. (This reward is not included in the cumulative limit.)
337.PreDec:
Awaken the spring breeze with lively celebrations and mark the Renewal Light with lanterns. Collect and release lanterns of four colors to light up the sky over Asterleeds together.
Each time you accumulate a full bar of points, you will get 1 Renewal Seal. You can obtain a cumulative total of up to 100 Renewal Seals from this event and the Colorflare Trial.
Your first participation each day during the event will grant an extra 3 Renewal Seals. (This reward is not included in the cumulative limit.)

352.Name: Travel Beacons
352.ActDes: Let your steps measure the road ahead, and your hands light the beacons along the way. These scattered beacons will become the pages of your own personal travelogue.
352.PreDec: Let your steps measure the road ahead, and your hands light the beacons along the way. These scattered beacons will become the pages of your own personal travelogue.

355.Name: Tracing Dreams and Lights
355.ActDes: Pick up scattered fragments to piece together your own commemorative album. Make every journey you've taken into a shining treasure.
355.PreDec: Pick up scattered fragments to piece together your own commemorative album. Make every journey you've taken into a shining treasure.

356.Name: Sea Breeze Feast
356.ActDes:
The adventurer's footprints fade, but the sea breeze remembers. As it sweeps along the long streets and the lights glow warmly, the feast unfolds. The "Sea Breeze Feast" arrives as promised.
It is the unspoken greeting this port city offers to travelers.
Banquet Food: Grants Strength, Agility, and Intellect +500 (main stats scale according to the adventurer's class) for 2 hours when consumed.
356.PreDec:
The adventurer's footprints fade, but the sea breeze remembers. As it sweeps along the long streets and the lights glow warmly, the feast unfolds. The "Sea Breeze Feast" arrives as promised.
It is the unspoken greeting this port city offers to travelers.

358.Name: Embernight Reflection
358.ActDes: Embers light the path of the long night. Footsteps engrave the chapters of the dark. These scattered traces play an ember-night movement that is uniquely yours.
358.PreDec: Embers light the path of the long night. Footsteps engrave the chapters of the dark. These scattered traces play an ember-night movement that is uniquely yours.

401.Name: Starlight Fireworks
401.ActDes: A gentle seabreeze, fireworks blooming just for you. During the event, head to the beach and search for treasures prepared by the stars and fireworks. Receive a large amount of Friendship Points, Silver Star Badges, and gear materials for your first participation each day.

402.Name: Starlight Fireworks
402.ActDes: A gentle seabreeze, fireworks blooming just for you. During the event, head to the beach and search for treasures prepared by the stars and fireworks. Receive a large amount of Friendship Points, Silver Star Badges, and gear materials for your first participation each day.

403.Name: Spirit Dance​
403.ActDes: No skill required! Just follow your heart! Dance freely, and feel the raw passion of the Kanamia Spirit Dance!
403.PreDec: No skill required! Just follow your heart! Dance freely, and feel the raw passion of the Kanamia Spirit Dance!

404.Name: Harvest Feast​
404.ActDes:
Come taste tribal delicacies and gain unique buffs.

Abundant Food: Grants 300 Strength/Agility/Intellect for 1 hour. Duration stacks when you eat again, up to 5 hours.

Magic Food: Grants a random special effect for 3 minutes.
404.PreDec: The Harvest Feast Begins! Come taste tribal delicacies and gain unique buffs.

405.Name: Morph Party
405.ActDes:
Morph Party: Let the Celebration Begin!
Immerse yourself in ancient traditions and discover the magic of random morphs in this winter wonderland of lights and imagination!
This event unlocks once the adventurer reaches Lv.10.
Your first participation each day grants an extra Snow's Gift.

406.Name: Snowman Strike! Nappo Hunt
406.ActDes:
Snowman Soldiers, Assemble and Strike! Mischievous Snow Nappos will appear in the plains. They spawn every 10 minutes during these periods. Transform into a snowman, join the joyful chase, and defeat them to win exclusive rewards!
Snow Nappos are immune to adventurers' skills and can only be attacked by snowmen.
Once entering combat, Snow Nappos will gradually melt. Keep up the fight, and you will eventually defeat them.
Defeat Snow Nappo to earn up to 20 Snow's Gifts each week, and up to 100 Nappo's Snowballs throughout the entire event.

407.Name: Year Demon Strikes
407.ActDes: Alert! The Year Demon strikes! Anomaly detected in front of the Plains Outpost! Adventurers, assemble! Head to Andra Outpost and use the special item "Firecracker" to suppress the Year Demon and protect the peace of the Renewal Festival!

408.Name: Colorflare Trial
408.ActDes:
Don't just keep your New Year's wishes in your heart—let them soar with brilliant fireworks! During the event, firework launchers will be set up throughout the festival area. Use gunpowder of different colors to light up the sky with your own special spark.
There are 9 firework formulas for Adventurers to discover! Let's set off some fireworks together!
Each time you accumulate a full bar of points, you will receive 1 Renewal Seal. You can obtain a cumulative total of up to 100 Renewal Seals from this event and the Spring Lantern Fair.
Your first participation each day during the event will grant an extra 3 Renewal Seals. (This reward is not included in the cumulative limit.)

409.Name: Spring Lantern Fair
409.ActDes:
Awaken the spring breeze with lively celebrations and mark the Renewal Light with lanterns. Collect and release lanterns of four colors to light up the sky over Asterleeds together.
Each time you accumulate a full bar of points, you will receive 1 Renewal Seal. You can obtain a cumulative total of up to 100 Renewal Seals from this event and the Colorflare Trial.
Your first participation each day during the event will grant an extra 3 Renewal Seals. (This reward is not included in the cumulative limit.)

410.Name: Glimmering Rhythm
410.ActDes: Come join Meowqi and dance away your worries with the beat! "Are you ready? The moment the music starts, you'll be the brightest star on the island! Meow~"

501.Name: City Rally
501.ActDes: Ride your beloved mount and complete the Asterleeds circuit race! Feel the sea breeze, witness the waves, and hear the roar of the engines. Young rider, go create a new legend!

502.Name: Tag
502.ActDes: On your marks! Join your friends and embark on an exciting game of chase and escape!

511.Name: Ee-chan, Don't Stare at Me!
511.ActDes: When Ee-chan turns back, it's your chance to run! But be careful, Ee-chan might look back at any moment... If you're caught, you'll have to start over. Reach the finish line without being spotted to win the game!

512.Name: Ee-chan Drum Band
512.ActDes: Boom, boom, bong! Come perform with Ee-chan! Join the Ee-chan Drum Band to turn into a cute performing Ee-chan. Have fun with your friends as you lay down an island beat!

514.Name: Tonight, Sing with the Stars
514.ActDes: When night falls, songs and stars intertwine, converging into a bright and special light at this very moment. Head to the stage and listen to the song in the girl's heart!

515.Name: Tonight, Sing with the Stars
515.ActDes: When night falls, songs and stars intertwine, converging into a bright and special light at this very moment. Head to the stage and listen to the song in the girl's heart!

1002.Name: Laser Cyclone
1002.ActDes: Step to the rhythm, dodge the sweeping lasers, and see how many rounds you can last!

1003.Name: Fish Frenzy
1003.ActDes: Three, two, one... the fish are flying! Focus and see how many you can catch!

1004.Name: One-Punch Brawl
1004.ActDes: Which Nappo is acting suspicious? A fake Nappo has snuck into the area. Spot the odd one out, aim, and knock it away!

1005.Name: Extreme Low Tide
1005.ActDes: Balance carefully across the collapsing gaps. Step steadily and try to stay until the end!

1006.Name: Wave Dodgeball
1006.ActDes: Arguably the perfect summer sport! Dash around while dodging water balloons from all directions. Can you last to the very end?

1007.Name: Interdimensional Punishment
1007.ActDes: Punch all that pent-up emotion back to another dimension! Strike that mysterious rival who loves adding "little troubles" to your adventure with a heavy blow, and watch what unfolds...?!

10003.Name: Wondrous Tag
10003.ActDes: Join other adventurers and transform into a Shadow Hunter or Stalker for a tense, exciting, and fun game of tag!
10003.OtherDes: All day. Recommend: Solo / Team Challenge

10005.Name: Cross-Platform Connection
10005.ActDes:
Log in on both platforms for instant rewards!
During the event, adventurers who log in successfully on both mobile and PC using the same account can claim login rewards.
Note: please log out from any other devices before logging in again to avoid login conflicts that may prevent you from receiving your rewards.
